title: tengine.session.client_identified v1
description: Anonymous client transitioned to a named agent via a connect/identify command. Producer: tengine silo_tester via the registry handle SESSION_CLIENT_IDENTIFIED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/event_registry.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'session_{session_id}'. Pair with tengine.session.client_connected on (client_idx, session_id) to link the anonymous and identified phases.

client_idx.description: slot index of this client in the silo's connection table

session_id.description: monotonic per-silo client session counter; mirrored in the CloudEvents subject as 'session_{n}'

agent_id.description: agent identifier supplied by the client (e.g. 'claude-pane-3', 'autobench-worker-7')

engine_frame.description: GPU frame index at the moment of identification
